surfaces.card: bg-white border-2 border-[#0A0A0A] shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_#0A0A0A] transition-all hover:-translate-y-1 hover:-translate-x-1 hover:shadow-[6px_6px_0px_0px_#0A0A0A]
surfaces.button_primary: bg-[#FF9EC6] text-[#0A0A0A] font-bold border-2 border-[#0A0A0A] shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_#0A0A0A] hover:-translate-y-1 hover:-translate-x-1 hover:shadow-[6px_6px_0px_0px_#0A0A0A] active:translate-y-0 active:translate-x-0 active:shadow-[0px_0px_0px_0px_#0A0A0A] transition-all
surfaces.button_secondary: bg-white text-[#0A0A0A] font-bold border-2 border-[#0A0A0A] shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_#0A0A0A] hover:-translate-y-1 hover:-translate-x-1 hover:shadow-[6px_6px_0px_0px_#0A0A0A] active:translate-y-0 active:translate-x-0 active:shadow-[0px_0px_0px_0px_#0A0A0A] transition-all
surfaces.input: bg-white border-2 border-[#0A0A0A] rounded-none focus:ring-0 focus:outline-none focus:shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_#B4D8E7] transition-all

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: p-6 or p-8 inside cards, gap-6 or gap-8 in grids
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-none or slightly rounded (rounded-md) but with hard borders

components_strategy.shadcn: Strip 'Vercel-look'. Replace soft shadows and subtle borders with 2px solid black borders and neo-brutalist hard shadows.
components_strategy.tables: Use Shadcn Table. Apply border-b-2 border-black to header. Use pastel background for header row.
components_strategy.charts: Recharts. Use sharp lines. Chart colors: #FF9EC6, #A1E3D8, #B4D8E7, #FDF5A9. Tooltip must be a neo-brutalist card.
components_strategy.badges: bg-[var] border-2 border-[#0A0A0A] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-xs px-2 py-1 shadow-[2px_2px_0px_0px_#0A0A0A]

hero_pattern.description: Abstract minimalist composition of geometric shapes. Use subtly in hero section backgrounds.

student_laptop.description: Students looking at laptop. Ideal for student dashboard welcome card.

study_group.description: Group of students studying. Use for landing page or about section.

animations.hover: Kinetic, bouncy. Transform translate and shadow offset adjustments. No soft fading.
animations.marquee: Use react-fast-marquee with bold black text or pastel text on black background for dynamic announcements.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure black text is used over pastel backgrounds for APCA/WCAG compliance.

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a College Quiz Platform & Results Portal.
Adopt a Neo-Brutalist Pastel aesthetic. This blends approachability for students with the structural clarity needed for dashboards.
Ensure you add tailwind classes for the hard shadows (e.g., shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(10,10,10,1)]) and thick borders (border-2 border-[#0A0A0A]).
Use Cabinet Grotesk (or Outfit) for headings, DM Sans for body.
Include a 'data-testid' attribute on every button, input, and interactive element.
Do NOT use Space Grotesk. Do NOT use soft drop-shadows. Do NOT use generic gradients.
